amendments.title: Feature Existence Check
amendments.change: Ajouter etape 'FEATURE EXISTENCE CHECK' dans Phase 1 ANALYSE: verifier si chaque item existe deja (grep + read), marquer DEJA IMPLEMENTE, reduire le scope
amendments.monitoringCriteria: 0 item deja implemente passe inapercu sur R11+R12
amendments.result: R11 applied (0 false starts on theme scope). 1/2 monitoring runs PASS. Awaiting R12.

amendments.title: KB FINALIZE Mandatory
amendments.change: Ajouter regle 7 aux REGLES ABSOLUES: KB FINALIZE OBLIGATOIRE a chaque fin de run (7 fichiers KB)
amendments.monitoringCriteria: Tous les fichiers KB mis a jour a chaque fin de run
amendments.result: R11 KB FINALIZE executed (Sentinelle corrected agent corruption). 1/2 monitoring runs PASS. Awaiting R12.

amendments.title: Sprint Tracking Gate
amendments.change: Sprint tracking VERIFIED dans SHIP gate — Sentinelle verifie via grep que les items sont coches
amendments.monitoringCriteria: PROGRESS_TRACKER et SPRINT_LOG a jour a chaque SHIP gate

amendments.title: Institutional Learning IL-7 et IL-8
amendments.change: Ajouter IL-7 (feature existence check) et IL-8 (KB FINALIZE mandatory) dans le SKILL
amendments.monitoringCriteria: Regles respectees dans les runs suivants

amendments.title: museum-web Context dans les agents
amendments.change: Ajouter sections museum-web dans 3 agents (Frontend Architect, DevOps, Code Reviewer)
amendments.monitoringCriteria: Agents connaissent museum-web dans les mandats W3+

amendments.title: AGENT_SCOPE_CREEP_GUARD
amendments.change: Agents must not commit, write KB, update tracking, or FINALIZE. Explicit hors-scope in every mandate.
amendments.monitoringCriteria: 0 agent scope creep incidents over 2 monitoring runs
amendments.result: R12-chore: LIMITES OPERATIONNELLES in 9 agents + SKILL.md mandate template + REGLES ABSOLUES rule 7
